Bash(cd /home/walzetass-kar/Documents/ProjectIhwal/CarWash-UAS-WebDesign && git add drizzle/db.ts drizzle/seed.ts features/auth/login-form.tsx lib/runtime/database-retry.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: improve login reliability and database resilience

- Add try-catch-finally to login form to handle network errors gracefully
- Reduce database retry attempts from 5 to 3 to prevent excessive hang time
- Reduce database connect_timeout from 8s to 5s and idle_timeout from 20s to 15s
- Make demo mode take priority when ENABLE_DEMO_MODE is explicitly enabled
- Fix seed script @next/env import and use upsert for user seeding
EOF
\)" && git --no-pager status)
